course.title: Bachelor of Information Management (BIM)
course.eligibility: 10+2 or equivalent with minimum 45% in any stream
course.description: A four-year program blending IT skills with management principles, preparing students for careers in IT management, systems analysis, and digital business.
course.subjects: Database Management, Web Technologies, E-Commerce, MIS, Programming, Business Communication
course.career: IT Manager, Systems Analyst, Database Admin, Web Developer, Business Analyst

course.title: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA)
course.eligibility: 10+2 or equivalent with minimum 45% in any stream
course.description: A comprehensive business program covering finance, marketing, HRM, and entrepreneurship to develop future business leaders.
course.subjects: Principles of Management, Financial Accounting, Marketing, Business Law, HRM, Entrepreneurship
course.career: Business Manager, Marketing Executive, HR Officer, Entrepreneur, Financial Analyst

course.title: Bachelor of Science in CSIT
course.description: A technology-focused degree offering strong foundations in programming, algorithms, networking, and software engineering.
course.subjects: C Programming, Data Structures, OOP, Operating Systems, Computer Networks, Software Engineering
course.career: Software Developer, Network Engineer, Data Scientist, System Administrator, IT Consultant

course.title: Master of Business Administration (MBA)
course.eligibility: Bachelor degree in any discipline with minimum 50%
course.description: An advanced management program designed for professionals seeking to enhance leadership capabilities and strategic thinking in global business.
course.subjects: Strategic Management, Corporate Finance, Operations Management, Business Research, Leadership
course.career: CEO, COO, Management Consultant, Director, Senior Manager
